'''Mitchell Brett Achurch''' (born 14 July 1988)<ref>{{cite web |title=Mitchell Brett Achurch |url=https://beta.companieshouse.gov.uk/officers/pc7CLVhDbbow0VjGw8xHqsJYy8k/appointments |publisher=Companies House |access-date=11 December 2017}}</ref> is an Australian [[rugby league]] footballer who most recently played for the [[Leeds Rhinos]] in the [[Super League]],<ref>{{cite news|url=http://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/leeds-rhinos/leeds-rhinos-departing-achurch-out-to-make-big-impact-1-7835381|title=Leeds Rhinos: Departing Achurch out to make big impact|newspaper=Yorkshire Evening Post|access-date=9 October 2017}}</ref> and [[Featherstone Rovers]] ([[Loan (sports)|loan]]) in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]]. His choice of position is {{rlp|sr}}.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.penrithpanthers.com.au/default.aspx?s=article-display&id=49843&title=so-who-is-mitch-achurch|title=Who is Mitch Achurch at Penrith Panthers|website=Penrithpanthers.com.au|access-date=9 October 2017|url-status=dead|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20110401195442/http://www.penrithpanthers.com.au/default.aspx?s=article-display|archive-date=1 April 2011}}</ref>

==Playing career==
After previously playing lower grade rugby for [[Western Suburbs Magpies|Western Suburbs]] in the [[NSW Cup]], Achurch made his [[National Rugby League|NRL]] début in round 4 of the [[2012 NRL season]] against the [[Parramatta Eels]], playing for the [[Penrith Panthers]], who went on to win the game 39-6

During August 2012, Achurch signed for [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] on a four-year contract starting in the 2013 season.

He played in the [[2015 Challenge Cup Final]] victory over [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] at [[Wembley Stadium]].<ref name="Leeds emphatically shut out Hull KR to lift Challenge Cup">{{cite web|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2015/aug/29/leeds-emphatically-shut-out-hull-kr-to-win-challenge-cup|title=Leeds emphatically shut out Hull KR to lift Challenge Cup|work=The Guardian|date=29 August 2015|access-date=8 November 2019}}</ref><ref>{{cite news |title=Scoreboard |newspaper=[[Rugby Leaguer & League Express]] |issue=2982 |date=31 August 2015 |page=31}}</ref><ref name=BBC2908>{{cite web| url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/34086760 |title=Challenge Cup final: Hull KR 0-50 Leeds Rhinos |publisher=BBC Sport |date=29 August 2015 |access-date=29 August 2015}}</ref>

He was left out of the [[2015 Super League Grand Final]] victory over the [[Wigan Warriors]] at [[Old Trafford]].<ref name="Leeds pip Wigan to seal treble after brilliant, breathless Grand Final">{{cite web|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2015/oct/10/leeds-wigan-super-league-grand-final-match-report|title=Leeds pip Wigan to seal treble after brilliant, breathless Grand Final|work=The Guardian|date=10 October 2015|access-date=8 November 2019}}</ref>

Achurch played for [[Ron Massey Cup]] side the [[Guildford Owls]] during the 2017 season.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.westsmagpies.com.au/news/2017/august/weekends-reports-v-guildford|title=Weekends Reports V Guildford – Western Suburbs Magpies|website=Westsmagpies.com.au|access-date=9 October 2017}}</ref>
He was named in the 2017 Ron Massey Cup team of the season.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.nswrl.com.au/news/2017/08/27/_2017_team_of_the_ye.html|title=2017 Team Of The Year – Ron Massey Cup|website=Nswrl.com.au|access-date=9 October 2017}}</ref>
